title: Better Apples
description: Who eats apples all in one go?
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3507f904cb5e19e3d390f22869eec99cfbc937ba.png)
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac60aa9c89f4a63b9000d4968c367d37b23d53.png)

### This is a simple mod which makes it so that you eat apples in four bites as opposed to all in one go!

Upon right-clicking with an apple, you will go through 3 stages of the apple being eaten- partially eaten, half eaten and mostly eaten. When you right click with a mostly-eaten apple, you will be left with a compostable apple core!

This mod is actually a port of a feature from a bigger mod of mine- Hollow's Tweaks! If you want this feature alongside a few other additions, [check it out here](https://modrinth.com/mod/hollows-tweaks)!

### Please report any issues, however small, to the Github [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/bency-mods/Bencys_Better_Apples/issues).

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac60aa9c89f4a63b9000d4968c367d37b23d53.png)
